wc -l /app/recovered_passwords.txt && echo '---' && cat /app/recovered_passwords.txt
python3 - << 'PY'
# As a fallback, try scanning the small .bin files with the same XOR keys
import re, sys
from pathlib import Path
keys = [bytes([0xAE,0x3F,0x4C]), bytes([0x4C,0x3F,0xAE]), b'ae3f4c', b'AE3F4C', b'varsea', b'subAlpha', b'subA', b'sub1', b'alpha', bytes([0xAE]), bytes([0x3F])
, bytes([0x4C]), bytes([0xAE,0x3F]), bytes([0x3F,0x4C]), bytes([0x4C,0xAE])]
pat_pwd = re.compile(rb'PASSWORD=([A-Z0-9]{23})')
pat_direct = re.compile(rb'8XD[A-Z0-9]{17}W54')
found = set()
for f in Path('/app/varsea').glob('*/*.bin'):
    try:
        data = f.read_bytes()
    except Exception:
        continue
    for k in keys:
        dec = bytes(b ^ k[i % len(k)] for i, b in enumerate(data))
        for m in pat_pwd.findall(dec):
            if re.fullmatch(rb'8XD[A-Z0-9]{17}W54', m):
                found.add(m.decode())
        for m in pat_direct.findall(dec):
            found.add(m.decode())
    for m in pat_pwd.findall(data):
        if re.fullmatch(rb'8XD[A-Z0-9]{17}W54', m):
            found.add(m.decode())
    for m in pat_direct.findall(data):
        found.add(m.decode())
if found:
    with open('/app/recovered_passwords.txt','a') as out:
        for s in sorted(found):
            out.write(s+'\n')
    print('\n'.join(sorted(found)))
else:
    print('NO_MATCH')
PY
sort -u /app/recovered_passwords.txt -o /app/recovered_passwords.txt && wc -l /app/recovered_passwords.txt && echo '---' && cat /app/recovered_passwords.txt
